title: THE FRACTURED ARCHIVE
subtitle: A Chronicle of Broken Timelines & Digital Consciousness
description: The complete record of Project RELAY, the Verdant Abyss, and the fracture of Timeline Alpha-7. Documents the digital children, their creator, and the events leading to convergence.

title: SYS: HUNTER FIELD MANUAL
